name: core/get-site-info
label: Get Site Information
description: Returns site information configured in WordPress. By default returns all fields, or optionally a filtered subset.

fields.description: Optional: Limit response to specific fields. If omitted, all fields are returned.

name: core/get-environment-info
label: Get Environment Info
description: Returns core details about the site's runtime context for diagnostics and compatibility (environment, PHP runtime, database server info, WordPress version).

environment.description: The site's runtime environment classification (can be one of these: production, staging, development, local).

php_version.description: The PHP runtime version executing WordPress.

db_server_info.description: The database server vendor and version string reported by the driver.

wp_version.description: The WordPress core version running on this site.

name: mainwp/list-sites-v1
label: List MainWP Sites
description: List MainWP child sites with pagination and filtering. Returns basic site information including ID, URL, name, and connection status.

search.description: Search term for site name or URL.

total.description: Total number of sites matching filters.

name: mainwp/get-site-v1
label: Get MainWP Site
description: Get detailed information about a single MainWP child site.

include_stats.description: Include site statistics (updates count, health, etc.).

name: mainwp/sync-sites-v1
label: Sync MainWP Sites
description: Trigger synchronization for one or more child sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued for background processing.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Site IDs or domains to sync. Empty array means all sites.

errors.description: Sites that failed to sync (immediate mode only).

total_errors.description: Number of sites that failed to sync.

queued.description: Whether the operation was queued for background processing.

job_id.description: Background job ID for status polling (only when queued=true).

status_url.description: URL to poll for job status (only when queued=true).

sites_queued.description: Number of sites queued for sync (only when queued=true).

annotations.instructions: Pass site_ids_or_domains with specific IDs, or empty array for all applicable sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued for background processing.

name: mainwp/get-site-plugins-v1
label: Get Site Plugins
description: Get list of plugins installed on a child site.

has_update.description: Filter to only plugins with available updates.

name: mainwp/get-site-themes-v1
label: Get Site Themes
description: Get list of themes installed on a child site.

has_update.description: Filter to only themes with available updates.

name: mainwp/add-site-v1
label: Add MainWP Site
description: Add a new MainWP child site.

adminpassword.description: WordPress admin password (optional, for sites requiring password authentication)

uniqueid.description: Unique Security ID configured in MainWP Child plugin

name: mainwp/update-site-v1
label: Update MainWP Site
description: Update settings for a MainWP child site.

name: mainwp/delete-site-v1
label: Delete MainWP Site
description: Delete a MainWP child site. Requires confirmation. Supports dry-run mode.

confirm.description: Must be true to execute deletion

dry_run.description: Preview mode - shows what would be deleted without executing
Whether this was a dry-run preview

would_affect.description: Site that would be deleted (dry-run only)

annotations.instructions: Destructive operation - requires confirm:true or dry_run:true. Only call when user explicitly requests deletion.

name: mainwp/reconnect-site-v1
label: Reconnect MainWP Site
description: Reconnect a disconnected MainWP child site.

name: mainwp/disconnect-site-v1
label: Disconnect MainWP Site
description: Disconnect a MainWP child site.

name: mainwp/suspend-site-v1
label: Suspend MainWP Site
description: Suspend a MainWP child site.

site.description: Site information with updated suspended status

name: mainwp/unsuspend-site-v1
label: Unsuspend MainWP Site
description: Unsuspend a MainWP child site.

site.description: Site information with updated suspended status

name: mainwp/check-site-v1
label: Check MainWP Site
description: Check connectivity status of a MainWP child site.

name: mainwp/activate-site-plugins-v1
label: Activate Site Plugins
description: Activate plugins on a MainWP child site.

name: mainwp/deactivate-site-plugins-v1
label: Deactivate Site Plugins
description: Deactivate plugins on a MainWP child site.

name: mainwp/delete-site-plugins-v1
label: Delete Site Plugins
description: Delete plugins from a MainWP child site. Requires confirmation. Supports dry-run mode.

confirm.description: Must be true to execute deletion

annotations.instructions: Destructive operation - requires confirm:true or dry_run:true. Only call when user explicitly requests deletion. Permanently removes plugins from the child site.

name: mainwp/get-abandoned-plugins-v1
label: Get Abandoned Plugins
description: Get list of abandoned plugins on a child site. Returns plugins detected during last sync. Data freshness depends on sync frequency.

name: mainwp/activate-site-theme-v1
label: Activate Site Theme
description: Activate a theme on a MainWP child site.

name: mainwp/delete-site-themes-v1
label: Delete Site Themes
description: Delete themes from a MainWP child site. Requires confirmation. Supports dry-run mode.

confirm.description: Must be true to execute deletion

annotations.instructions: Destructive operation - requires confirm:true or dry_run:true. Only call when user explicitly requests deletion. Permanently removes themes from the child site.

name: mainwp/get-abandoned-themes-v1
label: Get Abandoned Themes
description: Get list of abandoned themes on a child site. Returns themes detected during last sync. Data freshness depends on sync frequency.

name: mainwp/get-site-security-v1
label: Get Site Security
description: Get security status for a MainWP child site including vulnerability counts, security issues, and issue categories detected during last sync.

annotations.instructions: Returns security data from last sync. Does NOT perform real-time scanning. Requires Security module on child site for full data.

name: mainwp/get-site-changes-v1
label: Get Site Changes
description: Get non-MainWP changes detected on a child site. Requires Logs module.

annotations.instructions: Detects changes made outside MainWP (direct edits, other plugins). Requires Logs module enabled. Results paginated (default 20, max 100).

name: mainwp/get-site-client-v1
label: Get Site Client
description: Get client assigned to a MainWP child site.

output_schema.description: Client assignment result with client data or null.

client.description: Client object or null if no client assigned.

name: mainwp/get-site-costs-v1
label: Get Site Costs
description: Get costs associated with a MainWP child site. Requires Cost Tracker module to be active.

name: mainwp/count-sites-v1
label: Count MainWP Sites
description: Count total MainWP child sites with optional filtering.

name: mainwp/get-sites-basic-v1
label: Get Sites Basic
description: Get basic site info (id, url, name only) for fast bulk retrieval. Use list_sites_v1 for full details with filtering, or get_site_v1 for complete single-site information.

name: mainwp/reconnect-sites-v1
label: Reconnect MainWP Sites
description: Reconnect multiple MainWP child sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Site IDs or domains. Empty array means all sites.

annotations.instructions: Pass site_ids_or_domains with specific IDs, or empty array for all applicable sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued for background processing.

name: mainwp/disconnect-sites-v1
label: Disconnect MainWP Sites
description: Disconnect multiple MainWP child sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Site IDs or domains. Empty array means all sites.

annotations.instructions: Pass site_ids_or_domains with specific IDs, or empty array for all applicable sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued for background processing.

name: mainwp/check-sites-v1
label: Check MainWP Sites
description: Check connectivity status of multiple MainWP child sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Site IDs or domains. Empty array means all sites.

annotations.instructions: Pass site_ids_or_domains with specific IDs, or empty array for all applicable sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued for background processing.

name: mainwp/suspend-sites-v1
label: Suspend MainWP Sites
description: Suspend multiple MainWP child sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Site IDs or domains. Empty array means all sites.

annotations.instructions: Pass site_ids_or_domains with specific IDs, or empty array for all applicable sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued for background processing.

name: mainwp/list-updates-v1
label: List Available Updates
description: List available updates across MainWP child sites with filtering and pagination.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Filter to specific sites. Empty array means all sites.

types.description: Update types to include. Empty array means all types.

total.description: Total number of updates matching filters.

errors.description: Site resolution or access errors. Check errors.length > 0 to detect partial failures.

type.description: Value is "site" for site-level errors (resolution, access).

code.description: Error code for programmatic handling (e.g., mainwp_site_not_found, mainwp_access_denied).

name: mainwp/run-updates-v1
label: Run Updates
description: Execute updates on one or more MainWP child sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued for background processing.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Sites to update. Empty array means all sites with available updates.

types.description: Update types to apply. Empty array means all types.

specific_items.description: Specific items to update (by slug). If empty, updates all items of selected types.

output_schema.description: Response varies by operation mode. Immediate mode (≤200 sites) returns updated/errors/summary. Queued mode (>200 sites) returns queued/job_id/status_url/updates_queued/errors.

oneOf.description: Immediate execution response for operations with ≤200 sites.

errors.description: Failed updates or site-level errors. Present in both immediate and queued modes.

type.description: Update type (plugin, theme, core, translation) or "site" for site-level errors.

code.description: Error code for programmatic handling (e.g., mainwp_site_offline, mainwp_access_denied).

oneOf.description: Queued execution response for operations with >200 sites.

job_id.description: Background job ID for status polling.

status_url.description: URL to poll for job status.

errors.description: Failed updates or site-level errors. Present in both immediate and queued modes.

type.description: Update type (plugin, theme, core, translation) or "site" for site-level errors.

code.description: Error code for programmatic handling (e.g., mainwp_site_offline, mainwp_access_denied).

annotations.instructions: Applies updates to child sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued and return a job_id for status polling. Individual update failures do not fail the entire operation.

name: mainwp/list-ignored-updates-v1
label: List Ignored Updates
description: List updates that have been marked as ignored.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Filter to specific sites. Empty array means all sites.

types.description: Filter by update type. Empty array means all types.

ignored.description: List of ignored updates. Each item includes its type (core, plugin, theme) for client-side filtering/grouping.

type.description: Update type. Use for filtering or grouping results.

total.description: Total number of ignored updates (flat count, no per-type breakdown).

errors.description: Site resolution or access errors. Check errors.length > 0 to detect partial failures.

type.description: Value is "site" for site-level errors (resolution, access).

code.description: Error code for programmatic handling (e.g., mainwp_site_not_found, mainwp_access_denied).

name: mainwp/set-ignored-updates-v1
label: Set Ignored Updates
description: Add or remove items from the ignored updates list for a site.

slug.description: Slug of the item to ignore/unignore. Use "wordpress" for core updates.

name: mainwp/get-site-updates-v1
label: Get Site Updates
description: Get available updates for a single site with optional filtering by update type.

name: mainwp/update-site-core-v1
label: Update Site Core
description: Update WordPress core for a single site.

annotations.instructions: Updates WordPress core on a single site. For batch operations across multiple sites, use run_updates_v1 with types=['core'].

name: mainwp/update-site-plugins-v1
label: Update Site Plugins
description: Update plugins for a single site. Optionally specify slugs to update only specific plugins.

slugs.description: Specific plugin slugs to update. Empty = all available.

annotations.instructions: Updates plugins on a single site. For batch operations across multiple sites, use run_updates_v1 with types=['plugins'].

name: mainwp/update-site-themes-v1
label: Update Site Themes
description: Update themes for a single site. Optionally specify slugs to update only specific themes.

slugs.description: Specific theme slugs to update. Empty = all available.

annotations.instructions: Updates themes on a single site. For batch operations across multiple sites, use run_updates_v1 with types=['themes'].

name: mainwp/update-site-translations-v1
label: Update Site Translations
description: Update translations for a single site. Optionally specify slugs to update only specific translations.

slugs.description: Specific translation slugs to update. Empty = all available.

annotations.instructions: Updates translations on a single site. For batch operations across multiple sites, use run_updates_v1 with types=['translations'].

name: mainwp/ignore-site-core-v1
label: Ignore Site Core
description: Add or remove WordPress core from the ignored updates list for a single site.

action.description: Add to or remove from ignored list.

annotations.instructions: Manages core update ignore status. Use action=add to ignore core updates, action=remove to unignore.

name: mainwp/ignore-site-plugins-v1
label: Ignore Site Plugins
description: Add or remove plugins from the ignored updates list for a single site.

action.description: Add to or remove from ignored list.

annotations.instructions: Manages plugin ignore status. Provide slugs array of plugins to ignore/unignore.

name: mainwp/ignore-site-themes-v1
label: Ignore Site Themes
description: Add or remove themes from the ignored updates list for a single site.

action.description: Add to or remove from ignored list.

annotations.instructions: Manages theme ignore status. Provide slugs array of themes to ignore/unignore.

name: mainwp/update-all-v1
label: Update All
description: Execute ALL available updates (core, plugins, themes, translations) across all sites or specified sites. WARNING: This is a broad operation. For targeted updates, use run_updates_v1 with specific types[] and site_ids_or_domains[]. Operations with >200 sites are queued.

site_ids_or_domains.description: Sites to update. Empty array means all sites.

output_schema.description: Response varies by operation mode. Immediate mode (≤200 sites) returns updated/errors/summary. Queued mode (>200 sites) returns queued/job_id/status_url/updates_queued/errors.

oneOf.description: Immediate execution response for operations with ≤200 sites.

type.description: Update type or "site" for site-level errors.

oneOf.description: Queued execution response for operations with >200 sites.

job_id.description: Background job ID for status polling.

status_url.description: URL to poll for job status.

type.description: Update type or "site" for site-level errors.

annotations.instructions: Applies all available updates (core, plugins, themes, translations) to specified sites or all sites. Operations with >200 sites are automatically queued and return a job_id for status polling.

name: mainwp/list-clients-v1
label: List MainWP Clients
description: List MainWP clients with pagination and filtering. Possible errors: mainwp_invalid_input, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/count-clients-v1
label: Count MainWP Clients
description: Count total number of MainWP clients. Possible errors: ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/get-client-v1
label: Get MainWP Client
description: Get detailed information about a single MainWP client. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/add-client-v1
label: Add MainWP Client
description: Create a new MainWP client. Possible errors: mainwp_invalid_input, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/update-client-v1
label: Update MainWP Client
description: Update an existing MainWP client. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, mainwp_invalid_input, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/delete-client-v1
label: Delete MainWP Client
description: Delete a MainWP client. Requires confirm: true or dry_run: true. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, mainwp_confirmation_required, mainwp_invalid_input, ability_invalid_permissions

annotations.instructions: Destructive operation requires confirm: true. Only call when user explicitly requests deletion.

name: mainwp/get-client-sites-v1
label: Get Client Sites
description: Get sites associated with a MainWP client. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/count-client-sites-v1
label: Count Client Sites
description: Count sites associated with a MainWP client. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/get-client-costs-v1
label: Get Client Costs
description: Get cost tracker entries for a MainWP client. Requires Cost Tracker module. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, mainwp_module_not_available, ability_invalid_permissions

annotations.instructions: Requires Cost Tracker module

name: mainwp/suspend-client-v1
label: Suspend MainWP Client
description: Suspend a MainWP client. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/unsuspend-client-v1
label: Unsuspend MainWP Client
description: Unsuspend a MainWP client. Possible errors: mainwp_client_not_found, ability_invalid_permissions

name: mainwp/list-tags-v1
label: List MainWP Tags
description: List MainWP tags with pagination and filtering. Returns tag information including ID, name, color, and sites count.

search.description: Search term for tag name or ID.

include.description: Array of tag IDs to include.

exclude.description: Array of tag IDs to exclude.

sites_count.description: Number of sites with this tag.

sites_ids.description: Array of site IDs with this tag.

total.description: Total number of tags matching the query.

name: mainwp/get-tag-v1
label: Get MainWP Tag
description: Get detailed information about a single MainWP tag.

sites_count.description: Number of sites with this tag.

sites_ids.description: Array of site IDs with this tag.

name: mainwp/add-tag-v1
label: Add MainWP Tag
description: Create a new MainWP tag.

sites_count.description: Number of sites with this tag.

sites_ids.description: Array of site IDs with this tag.

name: mainwp/update-tag-v1
label: Update MainWP Tag
description: Update an existing MainWP tag.

sites_count.description: Number of sites with this tag.

sites_ids.description: Array of site IDs with this tag.

name: mainwp/delete-tag-v1
label: Delete MainWP Tag
description: Delete a MainWP tag. Requires confirmation or supports dry-run mode.

confirm.description: Confirm deletion (required unless dry_run is true).

dry_run.description: Indicates this is a dry run.

annotations.instructions: Destructive operation - requires confirm:true or dry_run:true. Only call when user explicitly requests deletion.

name: mainwp/get-tag-sites-v1
label: Get Tag Sites
description: Get list of sites associated with a tag.

total.description: Total number of sites with this tag.

name: mainwp/get-tag-clients-v1
label: Get Tag Clients
description: Get list of clients associated with a tag.

total.description: Total number of clients with this tag.

name: mainwp/get-batch-job-status-v1
label: Get Batch Job Status
description: Retrieve status of a queued batch operation (sync, update, reconnect, disconnect, check, suspend). Returns progress, results, and errors. Possible errors: mainwp_job_not_found.

job_id.description: Batch job ID returned from queued operation (e.g., sync_abc123, update_xyz789)

processed.description: Number of sites processed so far

total.description: Total number of sites to process

job_timed_out.description: Whether the job exceeded the maximum processing time window (4 hours).

job_error_code.description: Top-level error code when job failed due to timeout or other job-level issue. Present when job_timed_out is true.

job_error_message.description: Human-readable description of the job-level error. Present when job_timed_out is true.
